Name: Custom LX32 PCB (JLCPCB 4-layer 80x60mm — ENIG Black Mask)
Purpose: Carrier board fabrication. 2-layer FR4, ENIG surface finish (required for gold artwork), black soldermask, white silkscreen. 5-board minimum run.

Name: Lattice iCE40HX4K-TQ144
Purpose: Main FPGA for lx32 soft-core synthesis. 3.5K LUTs, 80KB block RAM, TQ144 QFP package. Open-source toolchain (Yosys/nextpnr) compatible.

Name: CH340C USB-UART (SOP-16)
Purpose: USB-to-UART bridge for FPGA programming interface. Avoids FTDI licensing issues. Well-supported on Linux/macOS without drivers.

Name: W25Q32JVSSIQ SPI Flash 32Mb (SOIC-8)
Purpose: External SPI flash for iCE40 bitstream cold-boot storage.

Name: AP2112K-3.3TRG1 LDO 3.3V (SOT-23-5)
Purpose: 3.3V low-dropout regulator for FPGA VCCIO (I/O banks). 600 mA output.

Name: AP2112K-1.2TRG1 LDO 1.2V (SOT-23-5)
Purpose: 1.2V low-dropout regulator for iCE40 core VCC. iCE40HX requires separate 1.2V core supply.

Name: 25 MHz Crystal Oscillator SMD (3225)
Purpose: Primary clock source for FPGA core. Guard ring on F.Cu.

Name: USB Type-C Connector SMD
Purpose: Power input and USB programming port. CC1/CC2 with 5.1kΩ pull-downs for charger negotiation.

Name: 100nF Decoupling Capacitor 0402 (x20)
Purpose: FPGA power rail decoupling — one per VCC/VCCIO pin per iCE40 datasheet.

Name: 10uF Bulk Capacitor 0805 (x4)
Purpose: LDO output filtering and bulk supply stabilization.

Name: 5.1k Ohm Resistor 0402 (x4)
Purpose: USB-C CC1/CC2 pull-down resistors. Required for USB-C charger detection.

Name: 100 Ohm Resistor 0402 (x4)
Purpose: LED current limiting resistors.

Name: LED 0805 (x2)
Purpose: Power-on and CDONE (bitstream loaded) status indicators.

Name: Microchip 23K256 SPI SRAM 256Kb (SOIC-8)
Purpose: External SPI SRAM for lx32 data memory expansion. 256Kbit / 32KB, 20 MHz max, 1.8–3.6V. SPI/SDI/SQI modes. Pairs with FPGA SPI master.

Name: VGA 2x5 Pin Header 2.54mm (THT)
Purpose: VGA output connector for lx32 video output. 5 signal pins (R/G/B/HSYNC/VSYNC) + 5 GND. Routes to FPGA GPIO via 68Ω series resistors.

Name: 68 Ohm Resistor 0402 (x6)
Purpose: VGA series resistors (R5/R6/R7) — one per colour channel. Limits current into monitor input impedance.

Name: 2.54mm Pin Headers (40-pos strip)
Purpose: OLED peripheral header and debug I/O breakout on carrier board.

Name: M3 Nylon Standoffs 10mm (x4)
Purpose: Board mounting — pairs with M3 mounting holes at board corners.

Name: M3 Screws + Nuts (x4 each)
Purpose: Secure board to enclosure or test fixture via MH1-MH4.

Name: 0.96in OLED Display (SPI/I2C)
Purpose: CPU status display — shows register values and instruction stream from running lx32 core.

Name: Jumper Wires & Breadboard Kit
Purpose: Peripheral prototyping and OLED bring-up.

Name: Shipping — JLCPCB to Uruguay (Global Standard Direct)
Purpose: International shipping for PCB and SMD components.

Name: Shipping — Tiendamia (OLED + jumpers to Uruguay)
Purpose: Local logistics for Amazon items via Tiendamia forwarding.
